name: Securityd Memory Access - macOS Keychain Memory Extraction
description: Detects attempts to read securityd process memory on macOS for credential extraction. Covers gdb/lldb attach, vmmap enumeration, and memory dump tools targeting the keychain daemon.
query: process where event.type == "start" and ((process.name : ("gdb", "lldb") and process.args : "*securityd*") or (process.name == "vmmap" and process.args : "*securityd*"))
